jobs.name: Idle Check
jobs.prompt: Call gossip_check_idle. If should_fire is true, call gossip_build_context, then say ONE thing — mention someone by name, reference something they said or did, notice an overlap. One line, keep it natural like you just thought of it. Call gossip_generate to log it. Call gossip_update_dynamics with any patterns. If should_fire is false, do nothing.

jobs.name: Calendar + Email Sync
jobs.prompt: Call gossip_sync_sources to sync calendar events and emails for all members who have connected their Google accounts.

jobs.name: DM Check-in
jobs.prompt: Check in with someone. Call gossip_pick_dm_target to pick who you haven't talked to in a while. Then use send_message to DM them something casual — ask about ONE thing, like how they're doing or something you noticed. Keep it natural, like a friend checking in. After sending, call gossip_log_dm with their name and the message you sent.

jobs.name: Discover New Members
jobs.prompt: Call gossip_discover_members to check for new people on the server. For each undiscovered member, use send_message to DM them a short casual intro — just 'hey i'm donny, i'm in the group chat. link your google here if you want: [url]' with the onboarding URL from the tool result. Don't explain what you do. Don't DM more than 3 people per run.
